name: Obsidian Hot Head
description: Obsidian Hot Head is a card counterpart of Hot Head in Skylanders: Battlecast.
biography: Obsidian Hot Head is a card counterpart of Hot Head in Skylanders: Battlecast.
personality: As an alternate counterpart of Hot Head, he likely shares the same explosive and enthusiastic personality as his original version.

story.content: Obsidian Hot Head is a card counterpart of Hot Head in Skylanders: Battlecast.

trivia: He is the second alternate counterpart of a Giant to be released after Skylanders: Giants, the first being Admiral Thumpback in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
Unlike High Noon Trigger Happy, Obsidian Hot Head does not appear in other media.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Battlecast, Obsidian Hot Head functions as a character card with the special ability Fiery Outburst.

basic.name: Fiery Outburst
basic.content: Obsidian Hot Head unleashes a powerful burst of fire on his enemies.
